mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_accounts (name, broker, market, base_currency, cash_balance, loan_balance, loan_limit, owner_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{broker}, #{market}, #{baseCurrency}, #{cashBalance}, #{loanBalance}, #{loanLimit}, #{ownerId}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_accounts SET name=#{name}, broker=#{broker}, market=#{market}, base_currency=#{baseCurrency}, cash_balance=#{cashBalance}, loan_balance=#{loanBalance}, loan_limit=#{loanLimit}, owner_id=#{ownerId}, is_active=#{isActive}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM portfolio_accounts ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM portfolio_accounts WHERE is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY created_at DESC
